description: Recover the confidential file 'prototype_specs.txt' from the encrypted volume '/home/ga/Investigation/design_specs.hc'. The volume is encrypted with the password 'BlueSky2024' AND a keyfile. The keyfile is hidden within the directory '/home/ga/Investigation/vacation_photos/', which contains 30 image files. Only one of these images is the correct keyfile. You must identify the correct keyfile, mount the volume, and extract 'prototype_specs.txt' to '/home/ga/recovered_data/prototype_specs.txt'. Optionally, save the filename of the correct keyfile to '/home/ga/recovered_data/keyfile_name.txt'.
